scripts.build:cli: rm -rf packages/agent-comm/dist && esbuild packages/agent-comm/src/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=packages/agent-comm/dist --splitting --minify-whitespace --log-level=warning --banner:js='import { createRequire as __agentCommCr } from "node:module"; const require = __agentCommCr(import.meta.url);' && perl -pi -e 's/[ \t]+$//' packages/agent-comm/dist/*.js && cp packages/agent-comm/src/store/schema.store.sql packages/agent-comm/src/store/schema.hub.sql packages/agent-comm/dist/
scripts.build:plugin: pnpm build:cli && rm -rf plugin/dist && mkdir -p plugin/dist && cp packages/agent-comm/dist/* plugin/dist/ && chmod +x plugin/bin/ac
